Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Public\\부적합\\shinsung-ncp-management-main" && py -3 -c "
import openpyxl, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('신성텍 부적합 현황.xlsx', data_only=True\)
print\('시트 목록:', wb.sheetnames\)
for sname in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sname]
    print\(f'\\n=== {sname} ==='\)
    for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=5, values_only=True\)\):
        print\(f'  행{i+1}:', list\(row\)[:20]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Public\\부적합\\shinsung-ncp-management-main" && py -3 -c "
import openpyxl, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('신성텍 부적합 현황.xlsx', data_only=True\)
ws = wb['사외불량']
print\('=== 사외불량 전체 데이터 ==='\)
for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, values_only=True\)\):
    vals = list\(row\)
    if any\(v is not None for v in vals\):
        print\(f'행{i+1} \(idx {i}\):', vals\)
print\(\)
ws2 = wb['사내불량']
print\('=== 사내불량 헤더 ==='\)
for i, row in enumerate\(ws2.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=4, values_only=True\)\):
    print\(f'행{i+1}:', list\(row\)[:20]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Public\\부적합\\shinsung-ncp-management-main" && py -3 -c "
import openpyxl, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('신성텍 부적합 현황.xlsx', data_only=True\)
ws = wb['사외불량']
# raw 시리얼 값 확인
from openpyxl.utils.datetime import to_excel
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=4, max_row=9, values_only=False\):
    cell = row[1]  # 날짜 컬럼 \(인덱스 1\)
    if cell.value:
        serial = to_excel\(cell.value\) if hasattr\(cell.value, 'year'\) else cell.value
        print\(f'날짜값: {cell.value}, 타입: {type\(cell.value\).__name__}, 시리얼: {serial}'\)
" 2>&1)
